write.workspaceSelectionFailed: Could not bind this workspace to a Write thread.
write.emptyFiles: No Markdown files in this workspace.
write.assistantEmpty: Send a writing request and replies will appear here.

threads.deleteBlockedRunning: Stop the running turn before deleting this thread.
threads.archiveBlockedRunning: Stop the running turn before archiving this thread.
threads.sendBlockedArchived: Restore this archived thread before sending a new message.

composer.noModelProfiles: No model profiles available. Add one in Settings.
composer.unsupportedImage: Only PNG, JPEG, WebP, and GIF images can be attached.
composer.attachmentAddBlocked: Wait for the current turn to finish before adding images.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Tune model profiles, provider access, context limits, and reasoning behavior.

subtitles.basic: Adjust interface language and theme preferences.
subtitles.model: Tune model profiles, provider access, context limits, and reasoning behavior.
subtitles.agent: Control context compaction behavior used before model requests.
subtitles.tools: Set tool availability, approval defaults, sandbox defaults, and command limits.
subtitles.workbench: Choose startup, layout, session, and Code/Write model defaults.
subtitles.visibility: Control approval presentation and runtime visibility preferences.

settings.unsavedChanges: This model profile has unsaved changes. Save before switching or deleting profiles.
settings.preloadMissing: Preload script not loaded. Open this page through the Electron app.

sidebarFooter.workbenchDescription: Applied to new turns and views

errors.positiveInteger: {{field}} must be a positive whole number.
errors.compactLimitTooLarge: Auto compact limit must be less than or equal to the context window.
errors.maxTokensTooLarge: Max output tokens must be less than the context window.

sections.appearanceDesc: These preferences apply immediately and are saved on this device.
sections.startupDesc: Control the first workbench view opened by the app.
sections.layoutDesc: Control sidebar width persistence and the default Inspector panel.
sections.sessionDesc: Set the default behavior for thread lists, workspace restore, and delete confirmation.
sections.modelDefaultsDesc: Choose profile defaults used when a turn starts without an explicit model profile.
sections.attachmentsDesc: Control how image attachments enter the Code composer.
sections.connectionDesc: These values are sent to the runtime gateway when a turn starts.
sections.contextDesc: Keep context, compaction, and output limits aligned with the selected model.
sections.reasoningDesc: Control provider thinking options and the Agent tool budget.
sections.compactionDesc: Choose how the runtime trims or compacts conversation history before model requests.
sections.permissionsDesc: These defaults apply to newly created threads and do not rewrite existing threads.
sections.toolAccessDesc: Control which tools are exposed to Code and Write turns before approval and sandbox checks.
sections.commandLimitsDesc: Set default limits used by command-backed tools unless a stricter tool call override is supplied.
sections.approvalPresentationDesc: Control how approvals, read-only tool records, and runtime failure toasts are shown.

descriptions.locale: Switch the interface copy between supported languages.
descriptions.theme: Apply the light or dark interface theme across the workbench.
descriptions.followSystemTheme: Apply the operating system light or dark preference automatically.
descriptions.defaultStartupView: Choose whether the app opens into the code workbench or write workbench.
descriptions.rememberLeftSidebarWidth: Save the last dragged width for the code sidebar and write file sidebar.
descriptions.rememberRightSidebarWidth: Save the last dragged width for the right Inspector.
descriptions.defaultInspectorMode: Choose the Inspector panel opened by default; Closed keeps it collapsed.
descriptions.showArchivedThreadsByDefault: Include archived threads in the thread list when the workbench opens.
descriptions.restoreLastWorkspaceOnStartup: Restore the last workspace path used on this device at startup.
descriptions.confirmThreadDelete: Show a second confirmation before deleting a thread; disabling it deletes immediately.
descriptions.profileName: Friendly name shown in the model profile picker.
descriptions.modelProvide: Provider dialect used by the runtime gateway, for example MiniMax, DeepSeek, or Custom.
descriptions.model: Exact model id passed to the provider API.
descriptions.protocol: Request protocol used by this profile. Custom providers may support either protocol.
descriptions.baseUrl: OpenAI-compatible endpoint root for this provider.
descriptions.apiKey: Stored with this profile. If empty, the runtime falls back to provider-specific environment variables.
descriptions.contextWindow: Maximum context tokens the selected model can receive.
descriptions.compactLimit: Soft threshold for automatic context compaction. It must not exceed the context window.
descriptions.maxTokens: Maximum tokens requested for a single model response.
descriptions.thinking: Enable provider-specific thinking or reasoning parameters when supported.
descriptions.reasoningEffort: Effort hint sent to providers that support reasoning levels.
descriptions.agentAutonomy: Controls automatic tool depth per turn. AGENT_MAX_TOOL_ROUNDS can still override it.
descriptions.codeDefaultModelProfile: Profile used by Code turns when no model profile is explicitly selected.
descriptions.writeDefaultModelProfile: Profile used by Write turns when no model profile is explicitly selected.
descriptions.allowComposerImageUpload: Show the composer image picker and allow selected images to become attachments.
descriptions.allowComposerImagePaste: Allow clipboard image files to become composer attachments without blocking regular text paste.
descriptions.defaultApprovalPolicy: Default approval policy assigned to newly created threads.
descriptions.defaultSandboxMode: Default sandbox mode assigned to newly created threads.
descriptions.commandTimeout: Default timeout in milliseconds for run_command and diagnose_workspace.
descriptions.commandMaxOutput: Maximum stdout and stderr bytes kept for command-backed tools.
descriptions.compactionEnabled: Allow the runtime to compact or trim history before model requests.
descriptions.compactionStrategy: Select the first strategy used when history exceeds the request budget.
descriptions.showDiffByDefault: Open file diff previews in approval cards by default.
descriptions.autoScrollOnRequest: Scroll pending approval prompts into view when they appear.
descriptions.showReadOnlyToolRecords: Show read-only tool records in the work process timeline.
descriptions.showFailureToasts: Show dismissible runtime failure toasts in the workbench.

profiles.title: Model profiles
profiles.subtitle: Create, duplicate, delete, and activate runtime model configurations.
